description: Create domain architecture comparison showing HSPA13 lacks the substrate-binding domain present in canonical HSP70s
code:
import requests
import json
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

# Fetch sequences for comparison
proteins = {
    'HSPA13': 'P48723',
    'HSPA1A': 'P0DMV8',
    'HSPA5_BiP': 'P11021',
    'HSPA8_HSC70': 'P11142'
}

sequences = {}
for name, acc in proteins.items():
    url = f"https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/{acc}.json"
    resp = requests.get(url, headers={"Accept": "application/json"})
    entry = resp.json()
    sequences[name] = entry.get('sequence', {}).get('value', '')

# Create domain architecture comparison figure
fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=(14, 7), gridspec_kw={'hspace': 0.5})

domain_info = {
    'HSPA1A': {
        'length': 641,
        'domains': [
            ('NBD (ATPase)', 2, 386, '#3498db'),
            ('Linker', 387, 393, '#95a5a6'),
            ('SBD (Peptide-binding)', 394, 509, '#e74c3c'),
            ('C-terminal lid', 510, 613, '#f39c12'),
            ('Disordered', 614, 641, '#bdc3c7')
        ],
        'label': 'HSPA1A/Hsp70 (641 aa) - Canonical'
    },
    'HSPA5_BiP': {
        'length': 654,
        'domains': [
            ('NBD (ATPase)', 1, 408, '#3498db'),
            ('Linker', 409, 419, '#95a5a6'),
            ('SBD (Peptide-binding)', 420, 500, '#e74c3c'),
            ('C-terminal lid', 501, 632, '#f39c12'),
            ('Disordered', 633, 654, '#bdc3c7')
        ],
        'label': 'HSPA5/BiP (654 aa) - ER Canonical'
    },
    'HSPA8_HSC70': {
        'length': 646,
        'domains': [
            ('NBD (ATPase)', 2, 386, '#3498db'),
            ('Linker', 387, 393, '#95a5a6'),
            ('SBD (Peptide-binding)', 394, 509, '#e74c3c'),
            ('C-terminal lid', 510, 613, '#f39c12'),
            ('Disordered', 614, 646, '#bdc3c7')
        ],
        'label': 'HSPA8/HSC70 (646 aa) - Canonical'
    },
    'HSPA13': {
        'length': 471,
        'domains': [
            ('Signal peptide', 1, 27, '#2ecc71'),
            ('NBD (ATPase)', 28, 314, '#3498db'),
            ('Disordered', 315, 352, '#bdc3c7'),
            ('Short C-terminal', 353, 471, '#d0d0d0')
        ],
        'label': 'HSPA13/STCH (471 aa) - TRUNCATED: NO SBD'
    }
}

max_len = 660
for idx, (prot, info) in enumerate(domain_info.items()):
    ax = axes[idx]
    ax.set_xlim(0, max_len)
    ax.set_ylim(0, 1)
    
    # Draw protein backbone
    ax.barh(0.5, info['length'], height=0.4, color='#ecf0f1', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    
    # Draw domains
    for domain_name, start, end, color in info['domains']:
        ax.barh(0.5, end - start, left=start, height=0.4, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        # Add label if domain is wide enough
        if (end - start) > 50:
            ax.text((start + end) / 2, 0.5, domain_name, ha='center', va='center', 
                    fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white' if color not in ['#bdc3c7', '#d0d0d0', '#ecf0f1'] else 'black')
    
    ax.set_title(info['label'], fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', 
                 color='red' if prot == 'HSPA13' else 'black')
    ax.set_yticks([])
    ax.set_xlabel('Residue position' if idx == 3 else '')
    ax.axvline(x=390, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3, linewidth=1)
    
    # Add annotation for missing region in HSPA13
    if prot == 'HSPA13':
        ax.annotate('← SBD MISSING →', xy=(500, 0.5), fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', 
                    color='red', ha='center', va='center',
                    bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='yellow', alpha=0.8))

# Add legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#2ecc71', edgecolor='black', label='Signal peptide'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#3498db', edgecolor='black', label='NBD (ATPase domain)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#e74c3c', edgecolor='black', label='SBD (Substrate-binding domain)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#f39c12', edgecolor='black', label='C-terminal lid'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#bdc3c7', edgecolor='black', label='Disordered region'),
]
fig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=5, fontsize=8, 
           bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02))

fig.suptitle('HSP70 Family Domain Architecture Comparison\nHSPA13 Lacks the Substrate-Binding Domain Required for Chaperone Activity', 
             fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', y=1.02)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('domain_architecture_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: domain_architecture_comparison.png")
